leadText: The Pink Nectar (Japanese: うすもものミツ Pale Pink Nectar) is an item introduced in Generation VII. It is one of the nectars associated with Oricorio.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on an Oricorio , it changes it to Pa'u Style . It can only be used outside of battle. It is consumed after use.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S M US UM Royal Avenue (×2, daily) Day S V Delibird Presents (after earning 3 Gym Badges )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM Sw Sh BD SP LA The flower nectar obtained at the flowering shrubs on Royal Avenue. It changes the form of certain species of Pokémon. P E A flower nectar obtained from the flowering shrubs on Royal Avenue. It changes the form of certain species of Pokémon. S V Flower nectar obtained from a pink flower. It changes the form of a certain species of Pokémon.
